docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $240.00) SERVED JAN-31-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,525.21 FILED BY SONG, MYA AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
